phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, to the left.

responses.english: On the ground floor, to the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En la planta baja, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which entrance for my hall
phrases.text_local: ¿Qué entrada debo usar para mi sala?
phrases.pronunciation: Ke en-TRA-da DE-bo oo-SAR pa-ra mee SA-la?

likely_response.local: Use la entrada principal, Sala Kubo.
likely_response.pronunciation: OO-seh LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL SAH-lah KOO-boh
likely_response.translation_en: Check your ticket, it is usually indicated.

responses.english: Check your ticket, it is usually indicated.
responses.phonetic: OO-seh LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL SAH-lah KOO-boh
responses.french: Use la entrada principal, Sala Kubo.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está el restaurante?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DON-deh eh-STAH el res-tow-RAHN-teh?

likely_response.local: Sube al primer piso, junto al auditorio Kubo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-beh AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL ah-oo-dee-toh-REE-oh KOO-boh
likely_response.translation_en: On the upper level, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the upper level, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-beh AHL pree-MEHR PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL ah-oo-dee-toh-REE-oh KOO-boh
responses.french: Sube al primer piso, junto al auditorio Kubo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main auditorium is
phrases.text_local: ¿Me puede decir dónde está el auditorio principal?
phrases.pronunciation: meh PWEH-deh deh-SEER DOHN-deh eh-STAH el ow-dee-TOH-ree-oh prin-see-PAHL?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, puerta número uno.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh poo-EHR-tah NÚ-meh-roh OO-noh
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, door number one.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, door number one.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh poo-EHR-tah NÚ-meh-roh OO-noh
responses.french: Al fondo del pasillo, puerta número uno.
